title: Thapki Pyar Ki
subTitle: Thapki, a lively and intelligent woman, has a stutter that has led to rejection in her life. Determined to change things, Thapki decides to move to find a job and meet all her challenges with a positive attitude.

title: Udaan
subTitle: A strong-willed woman determined to free her village from the practice of bonded labour steers through the tempests that the cause brings into her life. Along the way, she achieves her dream of becoming an athlete and finds her life partner.

title: Kasam
subTitle: After lovers Tanuja and Rishi die, they find themselves reincarnated as Ranbir and Kritika. They must meet each other and lead a happy life together, which they were unable to do in their past life.

subTitle: The story of a young girl who inadvertently crosses paths with a self-centred and pompous superstar, Rishabh Kundra.
